events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1035. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: tree_nut, shellfish, peanut. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 45–60 g/meal. Prefers Italian; dislikes eggplant, kidney beans. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Chinatown.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Pasta Primavera
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 63 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Mushroom Risotto
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 65 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/800 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–60) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish/peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/800 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–60) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish/peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/800 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–60) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish/peanut ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1035 added to route R-CHIN-1 (Chinatown), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1035: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
